msContents.textLang: All Hebrew, but for one in Greek and Nabatean.

msItem.note: Fragment (a) has three lines written along the vertical fibres, the verso has spots which do not seem to be ink. Fragments (b), (c), (f) and (h) seem to be part of the same leaf and are all written along the horizontal fibres. The versos of fragments (b) and (c) have traces of what may be ink, the versos of fragments (f) and (h) are blank. Fragment (d) has one undentified letter. Fragment (e) is in Greek and Nabatean, with Greek also on the verso. Fragment (g) has letters written along the horizontal fibres, with a blank verso. Fragment (i) has six lines of biblical text (Exodus 2: 23-25) written on parchment. Fragment (j) has faint traces of letters, written along the horizontal fibres, with a blank verse. Fragment (k) has letters written along the horizontal fibres, with a blank verse. Fragment (l) has seven lines of a document written across the vertical fibres with a blank verso. Fragments (m), (n), and (o) seem to be part of the same leaf and are all written along the horizontal fibres with blank versos. Fragments (p) and (q) are written along the horizontal fibres with blank versos.

history.acquisition: Given by Egypt Exploration Fund in May 1915 through A. S. Hunt.

recordHist.source: Manuscript description based on Les papyrus en caractères hébraïques trouvés en Égypte, by Colette Sirat, Paris 1985, p. 123, ‘Notes on Hebrew Papyrus fragments from Oxyrhinchus’, by A. E. Cowley, The Journal of Egyptian Archaeology 1915, p. 209, and on the data of the Institute of Microfilmed Hebrew Manuscripts, National Library of Israel with additional enhancements by the cataloguer.

availability.p: Entry to read in the Library is permitted only on presentation of a valid reader's card (for admissions procedures contact Bodleian Admissions). Contact specialcollections.enquiries@bodleian.ox.ac.uk for further information on the availability of this manuscript.

listBibl.bibl: Cowley, A. E., ‘Notes on Hebrew Papyrus fragments from Oxyrhinchus’ The Journal of Egyptian Archaeology, Vol. 2, No. 4 (October 1915), pp. 209-213.
Sirat, Colette, Les papyrus en caractères hébraïques trouvés en Égypte. (Paris: Centre national de la recherche scientifique, 1985), p. 123.
